summary: Comprehensive testing of Mitti Basket new features: Settings API, Product Waitlist, Bulk Order Status, Broadcast Email, Payment Retry, Products Filtering, Extended Product Schema. All 26 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed for Admin Settings, Admin Broadcast, Admin Products (with new fields), Admin Orders (with bulk actions), and Customer ProductCard (badges, notify-me).
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/settings returns full settings with auth
POST /api/products/waitlist adds email to waitlist successfully
GET /api/admin/products returns products with new fields
Admin Settings page loads with toggle, min value, shipping message, sender name
Admin Settings page Save button works
Admin Broadcast page loads with subject, body, recipients mode selector, send button
Admin Products page shows Status column and Stock column
Admin Products modal includes badge_type dropdown, availability_status dropdown, stock inputs
Admin Orders page has multi-select checkboxes
Admin Orders page shows bulk action buttons (Mark Shipped, Out for Delivery, Delivered)
Admin sidebar shows Settings and Broadcast nav items
Customer ProductCard shows dynamic badges (Best Seller, Rare Find, Heritage, Aromatic)
Customer ProductCard shows 'Notify Me' button for SOLD_OUT/COMING_SOON products
Customer Notify Me form submits successfully and shows 'You're on the list!' confirmation
CartDrawer fetches minimum order value from settings API dynamically
critical_code_review_comments: All new features are well-implemented with proper authentication, validation, and error handling
Product schema migration includes all new fields: availability_status, stock_quantity, low_stock_threshold, badge_type, badge_text, badge_color
Bulk order status update correctly triggers email notifications for Shipped and Out for Delivery statuses
Waitlist system properly handles duplicates and sends confirmation emails
Settings API correctly separates public (no auth) and admin (auth required) endpoints
ProductCard component properly handles all availability states and badge types
seed_data_creation: Test waitlist entries created during testing with random emails (test_*.example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 sections of new features have been tested and verified working: (1) Public Settings API, (2) Admin Settings CRUD, (3) Product Waitlist, (4) Bulk Order Status Update, (5) Broadcast Email, (6) Payment Retry endpoint, (7) Products filtering (HIDDEN excluded), (8) Extended product schema, (9) Admin Settings page UI, (10) Admin Broadcast page UI, (11) Admin Products page with new columns and modal fields, (12) Admin Orders page with bulk actions, (13) Admin sidebar navigation, (14) Customer ProductCard with badges and notify-me, (15) CartDrawer with dynamic min order value. Products in DB: 20 total, some with SOLD_OUT/COMING_SOON status showing Notify Me buttons. Orders: 17 total with various statuses.
